case_title: ZORA L KOLKEY VS. CLAIRE HULTIM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOLKEY, ZORA L ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZORA L. KOLKEY. DEFENDANT CLAIRE HULTIM DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/08/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY KOLKEY, ZORA L AS TO DEFENDANT HULTIM, CLAIRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOLKEY, ZORA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HULTIM, CLAIRE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT HULTIM, CLAIRE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HULTIM, CLAIRE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 10.00 - SERVED OCT-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HULTIM, CLAIRE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOLKEY, ZORA L AS TO DEFENDANT HULTIM, CLAIRE
